title: Deodeok and Root Tagine
description: A hearty, comforting tagine from North Africa, featuring deodeok, root, and a blend of spices. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Peel and chop the deodeok and root into bite-sized pieces.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the Algerian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the deodeok and root, and cook for 5 minutes.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven, and cook for 30 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven, and stir in the cheesy crumbles.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
